who: insurance claims adjusters in mid-sized firms processing 10-20 claims/month
offer: For insurance claims adjusters in mid-sized firms processing 10-20 claims/month, lack of timely reminders causes missed updates. We schedule and send claims status reminders instead of manual tracking of claims status.
problem: Lack of timely reminders for claims status updates
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for insurance claims adjusters

Collect 10 short interviews from target users
